items.name: tree-gen
items.description: Procedurally generated, Klimt-style trees of life rendered as SVG. Zero runtime dependencies, deterministic from a seed, isomorphic (Node/Bun/browser). Hand-rolled PRNG, vec2, beziers, log-spirals, and SVG serializer. Tunable depth, curl, leaves, gravitropism, and wind. Ships an interactive Vienna Secession showcase. TypeScript, ESM-only.
